storz_amusements_llc: Matches any account path where 'Storz Amusements LLC' appears after the first colon (e.g., 'Assets:Storz Amusements LLC:Checking')
Matches any account with 'Storz Amusements LLC' anywhere in the path
Matches accounts using the 'SAM' abbreviation (Storz Amusements)
Matches Storz Amusements loans under Liabilities
Matches Opening Balance accounts for Storz Amusements LLC
storz_cash_services_llc: Matches any account path where 'Storz Cash Services LLC' appears after the first colon (e.g., 'Expenses:Storz Cash Services LLC:Supplies')
Matches any account with 'Storz Cash Services LLC' anywhere in the path
Matches any account with 'Storz Cash Services' (without LLC)
Matches accounts using the 'SCS' abbreviation (Storz Cash Services)
Matches Storz Cash Services income accounts
Matches Storz Cash Services loans under Liabilities
Matches Opening Balance accounts for Storz Cash Services LLC
storz_property_management_llc: Matches any account path where 'Storz Property Management LLC' appears after the first colon (e.g., 'Assets:Storz Property Management LLC:Property')
Matches any account with 'Storz Property Management LLC' anywhere in the path
Matches any account with 'Storz Property Management' (without LLC)
Matches accounts using the 'SPM' abbreviation (Storz Property Management)
Matches Storz Property Management income accounts
personal: Matches all Equity accounts starting with 'Home' (e.g., 'Equity:Home Equity')
Matches all Liabilities accounts starting with 'Personal' (e.g., 'Liabilities:Personal Loan')
Matches all Assets accounts starting with 'Personal' (e.g., 'Assets:Personal Checking')

Matches all Assets accounts starting with 'Family' (e.g., 'Assets:Family Savings')

Matches any account with '3023 Old hill' (lowercase variant)
